name: bifu
description: BifuFX trading platform — spot, contract, forex (MT5/TradFi), payments, WebSocket and orion signals, exposed as agent skills and MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: Read balances/positions/orders and place or cancel spot & contract orders on the BifuFX platform through the bifu-cli MCP server, plus skills covering auth, config, forex, payments, WebSocket streams and orion signals.
